mano_cua.result_summary: 确认bug:卡片标题h3元素使用leading-none(line-height:1)配合truncate(overflow:hidden),导致下伸字母(g,y,p)底部被裁剪。font-size=1.25rem=20px,line-height=1即20px,descender部分(约4-5px)被overflow:hidden裁掉。通过DevTools验证CSS:text-xl的1.75rem line-height被leading-none覆盖。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Confirmed visual bug: leading-none class (line-height:1) combined with overflow:hidden from truncate causes descender letters (g,y,p) in card title to be clipped. Element h3 is 163x20px, font-size 20px, line-height 20px, descenders extend 4-5px below baseline and get clipped.
